Sea slugs: photo index

molluscs text index | photo index Phylum Mollusca

Class Gastropoda > sea slugs Photo index of sea slugs on Singapore shores

slugs with feathery external gills on their backs small slugs <5cm large slugs >5cm very large slugs >10cm slugs without external gills body in two flaps body rounded with bumps body hairy or with finger-like projections body with tendrils, etc body smooth with external shell

These are NOT sea slugs

Flatworms
Phylum Annelida
Class Polycladida


Synaptid sea cucumbers Phylum Echinodermata
Class Holothuroidea


Hoof-shield limpet
Phylum Mollusca


Cowries
Phylum Mollusca
Family Cypraeidae


Moon snail
Family Naticidae

how to tell apart

  • flatworms and slugs
  • nudibranchs, sea hares and sap-sucking slugs
  • smooth worm-like animals
  • hairy slugs and snails

molluscs on this site

sea slugs

external gills
body features

large >5cm
very large >10cm

no external gills

with bumps
